D:\user\xxh\ŃĐľżorĎîÄż\LSTM\LSTM»ă×Ü\´úÂë\ĘµŃématlab\flat\flat_with_sequence\data\flat_selected.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=2048, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=32, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=4, bias=False)
)
D:\user\xxh\ŃĐľżorĎîÄż\LSTM\LSTM»ă×Ü\´úÂë\ĘµŃématlab\flat\flat_with_sequence\data\flat_selected.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=2048, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=32, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=4, bias=False)
)
D:\user\xxh\ŃĐľżorĎîÄż\LSTM\LSTM»ă×Ü\´úÂë\ĘµŃématlab\flat\flat_with_sequence\data\flat_selected.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=19, out_features=19, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=19, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=2048, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=32, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=19, bias=False)
)
